{
  "claims": [
    "The overwhelming majority of conservatorship cases involve private family matters that should not be subject to public hearings.",
    "Senate Bill 578 will make privacy the standard rule for LPS conservatorship proceedings.",
    "LPS conservatorships involve the involuntary commitment of mentally ill persons who are dangerous or unable to meet their basic needs.",
    "The California State Auditor found that county courts have varying standards regarding the public or closed nature of LPS conservatorship hearings.",
    "The State Auditor recommended uniform standards for LPS conservatorship hearings throughout California.",
    "Senate Bill 578 aims to protect the dignity of vulnerable Californians by ensuring their right to privacy in conservatorship cases."
  ]
